questions.explanation: Từ 'beloved' được phát âm đuôi '-ed' là /ɪd/, trong khi các từ 'developed', 'touched', 'focused' được phát âm là /t/.
questions.text:
Which word has the underlined part pronounced differently from the others?
A. beloved B. developed C. touched D. focused

Which word has the underlined part pronounced differently from the others?
A. fashion B. ancient C. angel D. danger
questions.explanation: Chữ cái 'a' trong 'fashion' được phát âm là /æ/, còn trong 'ancient', 'angel', 'danger' được phát âm là /eɪ/.

questions.text: Two of _______ festivals in Viet Nam are the Ban Flower Festival and the Spring Festival.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc 'one of / two of + the most + tính từ dài + danh từ số nhiều' chỉ hai trong số những lễ hội nổi tiếng nhất.

questions.text: While living in France, Marie _______ French quite quickly by interacting with locals daily.
questions.explanation: Cụm động từ 'pick up' có nghĩa là học lỏm, học một ngôn ngữ một cách tự nhiên qua giao tiếp.
Sau giới từ 'of' cần một danh từ. 'encouragement' (sự động viên, khuyến khích) là danh từ phù hợp.
questions.text: The teacher’s kind words of _______ helped me speak confidently in front of the class.

options.A: I think I should join something else.
options.C: Don’t give up! You’ll have another chance.
options.B: That club is too hard for them to try.
options.D: Maybe you should try something more challenging.

questions.explanation: Câu phản hồi 'Don’t give up! You’ll have another chance' (Đừng bỏ cuộc! Bạn sẽ có cơ hội khác) là phù hợp nhất để động viên người vừa trượt phỏng vấn.
questions.text:
Emily shares that she failed the drama club interview, and Phuong responds.
- Emily: “I didn’t perform well at our school’s drama club interview.”
- Phuong: “_______”

questions.explanation: Cấu trúc phủ định ở quá khứ: 'didn't + use to + V-inf' (đã từng không làm gì).
questions.text: Her daughter didn’t _______ eat chips when she was younger.

questions.explanation: Cấu trúc 'one of the + danh từ số nhiều'. 'the' đứng trước danh từ đã được xác định cụ thể bởi cụm 'events of our company'.
questions.text: Your effort and creativity made one of _______ events of our company a huge success.

questions.explanation: Thì hiện tại đơn được dùng để chỉ lịch trình, thời khóa biểu cố định trong tương lai.
questions.text: Our English test _______ next Monday at nine o’clock, so please arrive ten minutes early!
If the cost of public transportation _______, more people _______ it regularly.
questions.explanation: Câu điều kiện loại 1 diễn tả khả năng có thể xảy ra ở hiện tại hoặc tương lai: 'If + S + V(s/es), S + will + V-inf'.

passages.content:
TAKE PART IN A MOCK INTERVIEW FOR A SUMMER JOB
Your friend and you are planning to apply for a summer job in Da Nang. Prepare!
• Choose one of the jobs you like. The interview will be (13) _______ July 20th.
• Decide who is going to apply and who is going to hire.
• Prepare the interview in pairs.
- Interviewee: Get ready to present yourself with personal information, qualities, skills, experience and availability. Prepare (14) _______ questions about what you want to know about the job such as tasks, working hours and colleagues.
- Interviewer: Prepare the questions you are going to ask: personal information, qualities, skills, experience and availability.
• Give the job interview.
• Your classmates will comment on your (15) _______ during the interview.
• For (16) _______ information, contact 19007666.

questions.explanation: Câu 'Face-to-face communication brings many important benefits.' là câu chủ đề phù hợp nhất vì bao quát toàn bộ nội dung của các câu sau nói về những lợi ích của giao tiếp trực tiếp.
questions.text: Choose the TOPIC SENTENCE that can BEGIN the text most appropriately.

options.A: Face-to-face communication brings many important benefits.
options.B: Talking in person helps avoid confusion caused by unclear messages.
options.C: Eye contact and body language help make a message easier to understand.
options.D: Nowadays, people often text or call instead of meeting in person.

questions.explanation: Câu b ('These non-verbal signals...') bắt đầu để liên kết với câu trước ('eye contact, body language...'). Sau đó câu a ('Talking in person also...') phát triển thêm ý. Câu c ('Spending time together...') làm rõ hơn cho ý mối quan hệ khăng khít ở câu a.
questions.text:
Put the sentences (a-c) in the correct order, then fill in the blank to make a logical text.
a. Talking in person also builds stronger relationships and creates more trust.
b. These non-verbal signals make the message easier to understand and help avoid confusion.
c. Spending time together allows friends and family to feel closer and more connected.

passages.title: Face-to-face Communication
passages.content: (17) _______ It helps people understand each other more clearly by using eye contact, body language, and facial expressions. (18) _______ Because of these advantages, face-to-face communication is still very important in our daily lives.

A lot of teenagers love music. It helps them express themselves and connect with others. Teens often listen to music through headphones or go to concerts with friends. However, (19) _______ good or bad effects on teen behaviour?
Some people believe that music has a couple of positive effects. It can make teens feel better when they are sad, and it helps them connect (20) _______ like the same music. Also, learning to play an instrument or write songs can make teens more creative and disciplined.
(21) _______, some people worry about the negative effects. Some songs with violent or bad words might influence teens to act in risky ways. Music (22) _______ teens’ hearing if they listen to it too loudly through headphones.
Parents (23) _______ an important role in helping teens make good choices about music. They (24) _______ talk to teens about the meaning of songs and help them avoid harmful music. With the right guidance, music can have a good influence on teenagers.

questions.explanation: 'music' là danh từ không đếm được (số ít), trong câu hỏi ta dùng trợ động từ 'does' và động từ nguyên thể 'have'.

Trật tự từ đúng của động từ khuyết thiếu và trạng từ là: Modal verb (can) + Adverb (also) + Verb (hurt).

questions.explanation: Cấu trúc 'remind sb of sth' tương đương với 'make sb remember sth' (gợi nhớ cho ai điều gì).
questions.text: These old photos remind us of the fun times we had on our family holiday.

options.D: We took these photos during the fun times we had on our family holiday.

options.C: These photos help me experienced the fun times during our family holiday.
options.A: The fun times we had on our family holiday brings back the memory of these photos.

questions.text: Linh asked me whether she had to wait there any longer.

options.A: “Do I have to wait here any longer?” Linh asked me.
options.B: “Does she has to wait here any longer?” Linh asked me.
options.C: “Do you have to wait here any longer?” Linh asked me.
options.D: “Did I had to wait there any longer?” Linh asked me.

options.C: I’m looking forward to presenting my robotics project to the class after the winter break.
options.B: I look forward to present my robotics project to the class after the winter break.
options.A: I’m looking forward presenting my robotics project to the class after a winter break.
options.D: I’m looking to forward to present my robotics project for the class after winter break.

questions.text: I / look / forward / present / robotics project / class / winter break.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc 'look forward to + V-ing' (trông mong, chờ đợi điều gì). Vì thế, phương án C sử dụng 'looking forward to presenting' là chính xác.

options.D: The contestant who guess the secret words stay in front of the board.
options.C: The contestant who guess the secret words stays in front of the board.
options.B: The contestant who guesses the secret words stays in front of the board.

questions.explanation: Chủ ngữ chính là 'The contestant' (số ít). Vì vậy động từ trong mệnh đề quan hệ ('guesses') và động từ chính của câu ('stays') đều phải chia ở dạng số ít.

Trong đoạn 1 có viết: '...the way people speak today is often very different from how their grandparents spoke.' (khác với -> 'differs from').

options.C: Because their speakers often forget how to use them.
options.A: Because they help people travel easily to new places.
options.D: Because they are spoken in places with no written signs.
They cannot express feelings in daily life.

questions.text: What does the passage say about sign languages?

passages.title: The Importance of Language
passages.content:
Language is indispensable to humans. It helps us share our thoughts, express our emotions, and understand one another. Without language, we wouldn’t be able to build relationships or learn from others. Over time, languages have gradually developed, changing in sounds, grammar, and vocabulary. That’s why the way people speak today is often very different from how their grandparents spoke.
Around the world, there are thousands of languages. Some are spoken by millions of people, while others are used by only a small group. Sadly, many of these smaller languages are disappearing. When a language dies, we also lose part of a culture and history. That’s why many specialists are working hard to protect endangered languages before they are lost forever.
Not all languages are spoken with voices. Sign languages use hand movements and facial expressions to share meaning. They are used by people who are deaf or hard of hearing and are just as rich and meaningful as spoken ones.
Learning another language can also help you personally. It can boost your self-confidence, strengthen your brain and help you understand different cultures. In today’s global world, speaking more than one language can help you open doors in both life and work.

Shopping is an important part of everyday life. (37) _______. Some enjoy going to small local shops, while others prefer big supermarkets or modern shopping malls. In these places, shoppers can look (38) _______. This is especially helpful when buying things like clothes, shoes, or furniture. Sometimes, shop assistants also give useful advice or help customers choose the right product.
Today, more and more people shop online. It is easy, fast, and can be done at any time from home. With just a phone or computer, buyers can look (39) _______. Items are then delivered to their homes.
However, online shopping has some problems. (40) _______. There may also be delivery delays, or the item might look different from the pictures.
Both online and in-person shopping have advantages, so people can choose what works best for them.

Sentences to insert:
A. People cannot feel or test the product before buying it
B. People visit many kinds of stores to buy food, clothes, and other items
C. at items closely, touch them, and even try them on
D. through hundreds of products and order them with a few clicks

questions.explanation: Ta dùng đại từ nhân xưng làm tân ngữ 'them' để thay thế cho danh từ số nhiều đã đề cập trước đó là 'two pairs of socks'.
questions.text: I bought two pairs of socks yesterday, and now I can’t find _____.
Fish have _____ to help them breathe underwater.
questions.explanation: 'gills' nghĩa là mang cá, cơ quan giúp cá hô hấp dưới nước. Các từ còn lại: 'tails' (đuôi), 'beaks' (mỏ chim), 'wings' (cánh) không có chức năng này.
Sử dụng thì Hiện tại tiếp diễn 'am visiting' để diễn tả một hành động tạm thời xảy ra khác với thói quen hằng ngày (được báo hiệu bởi cụm 'but today').
questions.text: I usually play chess after school, but today, I _____ my grandmother.
Let me _____ if you need any help with your project.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc 'Let + O + V (bare-infinitive)' (Để ai đó làm gì). Sau tân ngữ 'me' ta chọn động từ nguyên mẫu không 'to' là 'know'.
Tính từ 'excited' (hào hứng, phấn khởi) phù hợp nhất với ngữ cảnh khi con cái đạt điểm cao trong bài kiểm tra. Các từ khác không phù hợp: 'angry' (tức giận), 'bored' (chán nản), 'grateful' (biết ơn).
questions.text: My parents are always _____ when I get good results in English tests.
_____ is an electrical appliance used in a building. It cools the air inside the building in the summer.
questions.explanation: 'A conditioner' (điều hòa) là thiết bị điện dùng để làm mát không khí trong phòng vào mùa hè. Các phương án khác: tủ lạnh, thợ làm tóc, máy rửa bát đều không phù hợp định nghĩa.
Cụm từ cố định 'take a break' nghĩa là nghỉ giải lao, nghỉ ngơi, phù hợp với hành động 'have some coffee' sau đó.
questions.text: After working all morning, we decided to _____ and have some coffee.

questions.explanation: Cụm danh từ chỉ lượng phù hợp đi với nho (grapes) là 'a bunch of' (một chùm, một bó). 'a bar of' dùng cho sô-cô-la; 'a school of' dùng cho đàn cá; 'a piece of' dùng cho một mảnh, một miếng.
questions.text: She bought _____ grapes at the store for a healthy snack.

questions.explanation: Cụm động từ 'turn off' (tắt thiết bị) phù hợp với ngữ cảnh tắt đèn để tiết kiệm năng lượng. 'look after' (chăm sóc), 'put on' (mặc vào), 'take off' (cởi ra/cất cánh).
questions.text: Before you leave the room, please _____ the lights to save energy.
Tom is joining a climbing club _____ he is interested in climbing.
questions.explanation: Liên từ 'because' (bởi vì) dùng để chỉ nguyên nhân của hành động gia nhập câu lạc bộ leo núi.

questions.text: The children really enjoy going to the _____ as they can watch their idols’ performances.
questions.explanation: 'concerts' (buổi biểu diễn âm nhạc, hòa nhạc) là nơi khán giả có thể xem các màn trình diễn của thần tượng (idols' performances).

questions.explanation: Câu hỏi 'What is she like?' dùng để hỏi về tính cách, tính chất của một người, do đó đáp án 'She's friendly' (Cô ấy thân thiện) là phù hợp nhất.
questions.text:
Ann and Tom are talking about a new friend, Lily.
Ann: There’s a new pupil in our class. Her name’s Lily.
Tom: What’s she like?

Lee and Mike are at a campsite. They have just arrived after a long hike and are preparing to set up their camp for the night.
Lee: “Do you want me to put up the tent?”
Mike: “_____”
questions.explanation: Khi ai đó đề nghị giúp đỡ bằng cấu trúc 'Do you want me to...', câu trả lời lịch sự để tiếp nhận sự giúp đỡ là 'That would be great!' (Thế thì tuyệt quá!).

passages.content:
Read the text below and circle the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer to each question.

There are many ways we can help protect the environment. First, we should try to recycle things. This means using old materials to make something new. We can recycle paper, glass, and plastic. By doing this, we save resources and reduce waste. Secondly, saving energy is essential. We can switch off lights when we leave a room and unplug chargers when they are not in use. This helps to reduce the amount of electricity we use. Additionally, we should try to close the tap while brushing our teeth can make a big difference. Finally, planting trees is a great way to help the environment. Trees clean the air and provide homes for animals. Everyone can do something small, and together we can make a big chance to help our planet.

options.A: We can help to protect the environment in many ways.
options.B: Recycling is a way to protect the planet.
options.C: Saving energy is the most important action to save the environment.
options.D: Planting trees makes a big difference to our planet.

questions.explanation: Đoạn văn liệt kê nhiều giải pháp khác nhau để bảo vệ môi trường như tái chế, tiết kiệm năng lượng, tiết kiệm nước và trồng cây. Ý bao quát nhất chính là câu A.

Từ 'essential' mang nghĩa là thiết yếu, cực kỳ cần thiết, gần nghĩa nhất với 'important' (quan trọng).

passages.title: Part 4: Reading Comprehension

passages.content:
Read the following story and do the following task.

I’m Mark and my little sister’s name is Katy. Last Saturday, we went to London with our parents. Mum drove us there in the car. Our cousin Michael came to London too, but he went by train, so we met him at King’s Cross Station. He had a heavy rucksack with him. “Put your rucksack in our car, Michael,” Dad said. “We’re going to walk now.” “No, thanks. I might need it,” Michael said.
We went to the dinosaur museum first. I asked Dad lots of questions, but he didn’t know the answers. Michael took a book about dinosaurs out of his rucksack. “Here you are!” he said to Dad. “Thanks, Michael,” said Dad. When we left the museum, it was raining. “It’s OK,” said Michael. I’ve got an umbrella in my rucksack.”
In the afternoon, we wanted to go to the cinema, but we couldn’t find it. Michael took a map of London out of his rucksack, and we soon found the street where the cinema was.
passages.title: Part 5: Reading Story and Writing Tasks

questions.explanation: Câu tiếp theo cần giải thích rõ hơn về cách 'tránh lãng phí năng lượng trong giờ học và giờ ra chơi' (avoid wasting energy during lessons and at break time). Phương án D giải thích rõ điều này bằng cách liệt kê việc tắt đèn, quạt và thiết bị điện khi không sử dụng.
questions.text:
Choose the correct sentence to complete the first half of the following text.
To save energy at school, students should practise a few simple habits. To begin with, try to avoid wasting energy during lessons and at break time. _______

options.D: This means turning off lights, fans, and electronic devices when they are not in use, especially when leaving the classroom.
options.A: Otherwise, the school can save a lot of money on monthly electricity bills and help the earth become a greener place.
options.C: However, students need to keep the schoolyard completely clean by picking up trash and putting plastic bottles into the correct recycling bins.
options.B: In short, learners must stop using all electronic devices during their lessons and only read printed books to save the school’s electricity.

questions.text:
Reorder the following sentences to complete the second half of the text in a logical way.
a. By taking these simple actions, students can help reduce energy waste and protect the environment.
b. Finally, they should advise their classmates to save energy and work together to build good habits in the classroom.
c. Next, they should make use of sunlight and fresh air whenever possible by opening windows instead of using electric lights and air conditioners.
questions.explanation: Trình tự logic của các từ nối: 'Next' (tiếp theo - c) -> 'Finally' (cuối cùng - b) -> câu kết luận tóm tắt 'By taking these simple actions...' (bằng việc thực hiện những hành động đơn giản này... - a). Do đó thứ tự đúng là c – b – a.

passages.content:
Read the following passage and mark the letter A, B, C, or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

For young people, planning a career now means more than choosing a job they like. They also need to understand how work is changing. In the past, a person might learn one set of skills and use it for many years. Today, however, technology and new customer needs are changing the way people work.
Automation is one clear example. When a machine can do a task faster, more accurately and at a lower cost, that task may become obsolete. This has happened to some simple jobs in ticket offices, factories and service counters. However, technology does not only take work away. It also creates new opportunities in fields such as online business, video editing, digital services and software development.
Because of these changes, workers need more than technical knowledge. They often have to collaborate with other people, share information, and solve problems together. A doctor may work with nurses and technicians to manage digital records, and a hairdresser may use an online booking app to arrange visits and communicate with customers before they arrive. Even jobs that seem practical or traditional may now require basic digital skills.
There is no single career path that suits every student. University may be the right choice for some, while vocational courses may help others prepare for skilled work sooner. To build a successful future, teenagers should develop useful skills, stay curious, and be prepared for further changes in the job market.

questions.text: The word obsolete in paragraph 2 is OPPOSITE in meaning to _______.
questions.explanation: Từ 'obsolete' có nghĩa là cổ xưa, lỗi thời, không còn được sử dụng nữa. Trái nghĩa với nó là 'useful and up-to-date' (hữu ích và hợp thời, hiện đại).
Câu trước đó: 'However, technology does not only take work away. It also creates...' đại từ 'It' thay thế cho chủ ngữ 'technology' ở câu trước.
questions.text: The word It in paragraph 2 refers to _______.
The word collaborate in paragraph 3 is CLOSEST in meaning to _______.
questions.explanation: Từ 'collaborate' nghĩa là hợp tác, cộng tác. Gần nghĩa nhất với 'work together' (làm việc cùng nhau).

questions.text: Which of the following is TRUE according to the passage?
questions.explanation: Dựa vào đoạn 2: 'When a machine can do a task... that task may become obsolete.' (Tự động hoá thay đổi công việc cũ) và 'However, technology does not only take work away. It also creates new opportunities...' (Công nghệ tạo ra cơ hội mới). Phương án D phản ánh đúng thông tin này.

options.A: Students should believe that one career path is suitable for everyone.
options.C: Hairdressers use online booking apps to avoid meeting customers.
options.B: Workers in practical jobs never need to use digital tools at work.
options.D: Automation can change some jobs, but technology can also create new roles.

options.A: To work without speaking to any other people.
options.B: To replace all practical skills needed in hairdressing.
options.C: To stop customers from visiting the salon in person.
options.D: To make appointments with customers before their arrivals.

options.A: Students should choose one job and never change their career plans.

passages.content:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct option that best fits each of the numbered blanks.

MANAGING YOUR TIME BETTER
Many teenagers feel stressed because they have too much schoolwork and too many activities after class. To study more effectively, students should build good time-management habits. One useful way is to make a clear timetable and write down important tasks. This helps students avoid forgetting homework or leaving everything until the last minute.
Students can also divide big tasks into smaller steps. For example, instead of trying to finish a whole project in one evening, they can complete one part each day. This makes the work less difficult and gives students more confidence. (9)_______ can also help them stay calm before exams.
Another useful habit is to keep away from distractions while studying. Students should turn off unnecessary notifications and choose a quiet place to work. This (10)_______ their lessons more carefully and finish their homework faster.
Good time management is not only about studying. Teenagers also need time for rest, exercise and family. If they plan their day well, they can have enough time to relax without feeling guilty. This can improve both their physical and mental health. It may also help them (11)_______ better results at school.
However, students should not make their timetable too strict. A good plan should be realistic and flexible. When something unexpected happens, they can change their schedule instead of feeling stressed. Learning to manage time well is an important skill because it has a strong (12)_______ students’ future success.
(13)_______ students practise these habits regularly, they will become more independent and responsible. They will understand that (14)_______ is not only about working hard, but also about working wisely.

questions.text: The students at Sentosa School suggested using leftover food from the school _______ to make biogas.
questions.explanation: 'leftover food' (thức ăn thừa) thường lấy từ 'cafeteria' (căng tin/nhà ăn trường học).
Một công việc đòi hỏi nhiều sức lực, thời gian và sự kiên nhẫn được gọi là 'demanding job' (công việc đòi hỏi khắt khe/nhiều thử thách).

The more time teenagers spend on social media, _______ for outdoor activities.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc so sánh kép: 'The + comparative + S + V, the + comparative + S + V'. Do 'time' là danh từ không đếm được nên dùng 'less time'. Cấu trúc đúng là 'the less time they have'.

questions.text: _______ a healthy lifestyle helps teenagers reduce stress and study more effectively.

questions.explanation: Mệnh đề chính là một câu mệnh lệnh yêu cầu trực tiếp hành động nên dùng động từ nguyên mẫu không 'to' đứng đầu: 'learn its culture...' (hãy tìm hiểu văn hoá...).

questions.text: Back then, her mother ran a small stall in the village market, and she always _______ fresh vegetables to nearby families.
questions.explanation: Trạng từ thời gian chỉ quá khứ 'Back then' và động từ 'ran' chỉ một thói quen, hành động lặp đi lặp lại trong quá khứ nên mệnh đề sau dùng thì Quá khứ đơn 'sold'.

Many young people today live in a fast-changing world. They use smartphones, study online and enjoy modern forms of entertainment. However, (37)_______. Traditional games are also worth preserving. In the past, (39)_______. Today, some schools organize Cultural Days, where students can try these games and learn about their meanings. Preserving traditions does not mean refusing modern life. Instead, it means choosing useful ways to keep cultural values alive. Young people can share photos of family festivals online, interview older family members or learn traditional songs from their grandparents. They can also join local cultural events (40)_______. Read the following passage about and mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the best answer to each of the following questions from 18 to 25.

James Watt was a Scottish inventor who played an important role in the Industrial Revolution. He was born in 1736 and is famous for improving the steam engine, which changed industries and transportation.
Watt loved mechanics from a young age. Even though he faced health problems and had little money, he stayed curious and hardworking. In 1763, while fixing a steam engine, he had an important idea. He realized that adding a separate part called a condenser could make the steam engine work better. This breakthrough was the start of his great inventions.
With the help of Matthew Boulton, a businessman, Watt developed his improved steam engine. In 1769, he got permission to make and sell it. His steam engine was very useful in industries like mining, textile making, and transportation. It helped factories, mills, and ships work faster and cheaper, making it an important part of the Industrial Revolution.
Watt didn't stop improving his steam engine. He made it safer, stronger, and cheaper to use. Because of his steam engine, production in factories became faster, and goods became cheaper. Many people moved from villages to cities to work in factories powered by steam. Steam-powered trains and ships also made travel and transporting goods easier.
James Watt's work is still remembered today. The unit of power, the watt, was named in his honour, recognising his pioneering contributions to science and engineering. He overcame many problems to make important inventions and inspire future generations.

Global warming is one of the most pressing issues of our time, caused by a rapid increase in greenhouse gases in the Earth's atmosphere. (I) Human activities, particularly the burning of fossil fuels like coal, oil, and gas, release large amounts of carbon dioxide (CO2) into the air. (II) These gases trap heat from the sun, creating a "greenhouse effect" that warms the planet. (III) While the Earth's climate has changed throughout history, the current rate of warming is unprecedented and poses serious challenges. (IV)
The impacts of global warming are far-reaching. Rising temperatures are causing polar ice caps and glaciers to melt, leading to higher sea levels. This puts coastal cities and low-lying areas at risk of flooding. Additionally, warmer oceans can intensify hurricanes and other extreme weather events. Changes in temperature and rainfall patterns disrupt ecosystems, threatening wildlife and leading to biodiversity loss. Global warming also affects agriculture, with heatwaves and droughts making it harder to grow crops in some regions.
Addressing global warming requires urgent action. Reducing greenhouse gas emissions is key to decelerating climate change. Governments, industries, and individuals all have roles to play. Transitioning to renewable energy sources like solar and wind power can significantly cut emissions. Protecting forests, which absorb CO2, and investing in energy-efficient technologies are also critical. By working together and adopting sustainable practices, we can mitigate the effects of global warming and secure a healthier future for our planet.

questions.text: ___________ do you like cycling around the park every weekend? - Because it helps me to keep fit.

passages.title: Sentence Arrangement (1-5)

questions.text: Dear Customer Service Team, a. After bringing it home and installing it correctly, I found that it did not work properly. b. Please advise me on how to return the faulty item. I look forward to your prompt response. c. Whenever the power is on, the drum does not spin, and the machine makes a strange noise. d. I am writing to complain about a washing machine I purchased from your store on 22 February 2026. e. As this is a brand-new product and still under warranty, I would like to request a replacement or a full refund. Yours faithfully, Laura Brown
questions.explanation: Thứ tự hợp lý: d (giới thiệu lý do viết thư) → a (sau khi mua và cài đặt) → c (mô tả vấn đề) → e (yêu cầu thay thế/hoàn tiền) → b (đề nghị hướng dẫn trả hàng).

questions.text: a. The upward trend continued and in 2020, more than half of its population lived in urban areas. In the next twenty years, the urban population is expected to reach 65 per cent of the total population. b. The line graph shows population trends in Fantasia’s urban and rural areas over the 1950-2040 period. c. By contrast, the urban population rose throughout the same period. In 1950, the percentage of urban population was just around 6 per cent. It increased slightly to 15 per cent in 1980. d. Overall, the urban population has increased and will continue to grow while the rural population has decreased and will continue to fall. e. In 1950, 94 per cent or most of Fantasia’s population lived in rural areas; this figure remained stable until 1960 before falling to 48 per cent in 2020 and is expected to drop to 35 per cent in 2040.
questions.explanation: Thứ tự: b (giới thiệu biểu đồ) → d (nhận xét tổng quát) → e (số liệu dân số nông thôn) → c (số liệu dân số thành thị tương ứng) → a (xu hướng tăng tiếp tục và dự báo).

questions.text: a. Mike: Not bad, thanks. I’m just glad it’s over! How about you? How’d your presentation go? b. Lucy: Sure thing! Come over around 10:00, after breakfast. c. Lucy: Hey! How did your Pragmatics exam go? d. Mike: No problem. So… do you feel like studying tomorrow for our English exam? e. Lucy: Oh, it went really well. Thanks for helping me with it!!
questions.explanation: Thứ tự: c (Lucy hỏi về bài thi) → a (Mike trả lời, hỏi lại) → e (Lucy trả lời) → d (Mike rủ học bài) → b (Lucy đồng ý).

questions.text: a. Firstly, it helps people distinguish between reliable sources and misleading or false content. b. As a result, individuals are better equipped to make informed decisions and avoid being manipulated by misinformation. c. Media literacy also encourages audiences to recognize bias, persuasive techniques, and hidden agendas in advertisements and news reports. d. On a larger scale, integrating media literacy education into school curricula is crucial for developing responsible and critical thinkers. e. Media literacy is an essential skill in the modern world because it enables individuals to critically evaluate the vast amount of information they encounter every day.
questions.explanation: Thứ tự: e (định nghĩa và tầm quan trọng) → a (lợi ích đầu tiên) → c (lợi ích khác) → b (kết quả) → d (mở rộng quy mô).
Thứ tự: b (Jane hỏi) → a (Katy trả lời băn khoăn) → c (Jane trấn an).
questions.text: a. Katy: Honestly, I’m not sure if I’ll go. I don’t know Sam that well. b. Jane: Hi, Katy. Are you going to Sam’s party at the weekend? c. Jane: Don’t worry. He’s very friendly, so I think you two will get along.

options.D: When people do not consume sufficient food, the body gradually struggles to regulate stress hormones, which may contribute to chronic illness

options.B: People experiencing stress usually lose their appetite because their brains require more energy
options.C: Eating sugary foods is the most effective way to reduce stress hormones in the body
options.A: The hypothalamus is the only part of the brain that is responsible for controlling hunger
options.D: When the brain senses a shortage of glucose, it may ignore signals from the rest of the body

questions.explanation: Đoạn 3 nói: 'When this region registers that the brain lacks glucose, it limits signals from the rest of the body.' → Điều này tương đương với não có thể bỏ qua tín hiệu từ cơ thể.
questions.text: Which of the following is TRUE according to the passage?
Which paragraph suggests that cravings for sweet foods may not indicate an individual’s deficiency?
questions.explanation: Đoạn 6 nói: 'cravings for sweets may not be a lack of self-control. Instead, they may reflect the brain’s need for energy.'

questions.text: Which paragraph provides experimental evidence that eating carbohydrates can improve task performance?
questions.explanation: Đoạn 2 mô tả thí nghiệm: người bị stress làm bài kém trước khi ăn, nhưng sau khi ăn carbohydrate thì kết quả trở lại bình thường.

options.B: illustrate how individual cases can obscure a broader structural issue
options.C: argue that public figures are the main contributors to climate change
options.A: suggest that media attention exaggerates environmental concerns
options.D: demonstrate that celebrities are unfairly targeted by environmental critics

questions.explanation: Tác giả muốn nhấn mạnh rằng chỉ tập trung vào một cá nhân (như Taylor Swift) sẽ làm ta bỏ qua vấn đề mang tính hệ thống rộng lớn hơn.
questions.text: The author mentions Taylor Swift in paragraph 1 primarily to

questions.explanation: 'Such efforts' chỉ các sáng kiến môi trường (environmental initiatives) như trồng rừng, dự án năng lượng tái tạo được nhắc đến trước đó.
questions.text: The phrase such efforts in paragraph 2 refers to

options.B: By complying with mandatory government carbon regulations
options.C: By investing exclusively in large-scale renewable infrastructure
options.A: By reducing the frequency of their international travel schedules
options.D: By financially supporting environmental projects to offset emissions

questions.text: According to paragraph 2, how do some celebrities attempt to manage their environmental impact?
questions.explanation: Đoạn 2 nói rõ: 'carbon offsetting, a practice that allows individuals to compensate for emissions by funding environmental initiatives'.
Đoạn 3 cho biết các sáng kiến bù đắp có thể vô tình làm hạn chế nguồn lực cho các dịch vụ thiết yếu như y tế và giáo dục tại cộng đồng thu nhập thấp.
questions.text: According to paragraph 3, some offset initiatives may be problematic because they

options.A: eliminate local employment opportunities in developing regions
options.C: unintentionally limit essential services in lower-income communities
options.B: reduce investment in global renewable energy schemes and markets
options.D: increase the operational costs of -scale solar installations

questions.explanation: Câu gốc nói những nỗ lực này hầu như không giải quyết được nguyên nhân gốc rễ của phát thải carbon quá mức → tương đương với 'make minimal progress in tackling the underlying issue'.
questions.text: Which of the following best paraphrases the underlined sentence in paragraph 3?

options.A: These initiatives are likely to eliminate the primary factors responsible for high carbon emissions
options.B: These programmes shift responsibility for tackling carbon emissions to alternative environmental sectors
options.C: These initiatives make minimal progress in tackling the underlying issue of excessive carbon emissions
options.D: These efforts tend to focus on reducing visible emissions rather than their overall generated volume

options.B: TerraPass has eliminated doubts about carbon neutrality claims
options.C: Carbon offset markets operate under strict international regulation
options.A: Offset programmes guarantee measurable reductions in emissions
options.D: Some offset transactions occur in poorly regulated environments

questions.text: Which of the following is TRUE according to paragraph 4?
questions.explanation: Đoạn 4 cho biết các giao dịch này thường diễn ra trên thị trường quản lý lỏng lẻo, thiếu tiêu chuẩn nhất quán.
'Legitimise' có nghĩa là làm cho hợp lý, biện minh, tương đương với 'justify'.
questions.text: The word “legitimise” in paragraph 4 is closest in meaning to

options.D: Carbon offsetting functions primarily as a public relations strategy without individuals’ sense of accountability towards the environment
options.C: Carbon offsetting guarantees measurable climate benefits through market-based investment in renewable initiatives
options.B: Carbon offsetting provides a comprehensive remedy capable of permanently eliminating luxury-related carbon emissions
options.A: Carbon offsetting may alleviate certain environmental pressures but does not fundamentally transform emission-producing behavior

questions.explanation: Bài viết chỉ ra rằng carbon offsetting có thể giảm nhẹ áp lực nhưng không giải quyết tận gốc, và cần cải cách mang tính hệ thống.
questions.text: Which of the following can be inferred from the passage?

questions.explanation: Câu này nên được đặt sau câu 'these transactions often occur in loosely regulated markets lacking consistent standards' ở đoạn 4, vì nó tiếp tục mô tả hậu quả của môi trường thị trường lỏng lẻo đó.
questions.text: Where in the passage does the following sentence best fit? 'This environment creates space for exaggerated claims of carbon neutrality without verifiable outcomes'

options.C: Growing public concern about luxury air travel has prompted calls for stricter government regulation of private aviation and improved oversight of carbon offset markets
options.B: Although media scrutiny of celebrity jet use has intensified, public criticism tends to focus disproportionately on affluent individuals rather than the broader patterns of carbon consumption
options.A: Although celebrities adopt carbon offsetting to address emissions from private air travel, critics argue that these measures are inadequate and effective climate action requires systemic reform
options.D: Carbon offset markets provide a practical mechanism for reducing the environmental impact of luxury air travel among high-profile individuals in response to growing criticism

questions.explanation: Bài viết tóm tắt: người nổi tiếng dùng carbon offsetting để đối phó với chỉ trích, nhưng biện pháp này không đủ và cần cải cách hệ thống.
questions.text: Which of the following best summarises the passage?
Choose the word that best fits: You've just started a new job or course, ___ you're already feeling overwhelmed.
questions.explanation: Liên từ 'but' diễn tả sự tương phản: vừa mới bắt đầu nhưng đã cảm thấy quá tải.
'Postpone' có nghĩa là trì hoãn, phù hợp với ngữ cảnh 'con ếch' là nhiệm vụ bạn hay trì hoãn.
questions.text: Choose the word that best fits: According to the 'Eat That Frog' method, if you have two important tasks, you should start with the biggest, hardest, and most important one first. The 'frog' is the task you most want to ___.

passages.title: Reading Comprehension (6-23)

passages.title: Grammar and Vocabulary (26-40)

questions.explanation: Cụm từ cố định: 'take action' (hành động).
questions.text: When you see that something isn’t right, you should consider ___ immediate action to correct it.
With ___ time and effort, you can master any skill.
questions.explanation: 'Time' là danh từ không đếm được, 'a little' mang nghĩa tích cực 'một ít'.

questions.text: For some people, working under pressure has become second ___.
questions.explanation: Thành ngữ: 'second nature' = bản năng thứ hai, trở nên tự nhiên.

questions.text: Improving your personal ___ can lead to greater job satisfaction.
questions.explanation: Sau tính từ 'personal' cần danh từ 'effectiveness' (hiệu quả).
Cấu trúc: 'one of the + tính từ so sánh nhất + danh từ số nhiều'.
questions.text: The festival is considered one of ___ largest spiritual events in the region.

questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ dạng bị động: 'which are located' → 'located'.
questions.text: The area is home to more than twenty pagodas and temples ___ along the scenic Yen Stream.
In addition to the main procession, ___ initiatives such as art exhibitions and food stalls will be held.
questions.explanation: 'Other' đứng trước danh từ số nhiều 'initiatives'.

questions.text: Local authorities have ___ security arrangements for the upcoming festival.
questions.explanation: 'Step up' có nghĩa là tăng cường, đẩy mạnh.

questions.text: ___ visitor must comply with the safety regulations.
questions.explanation: 'Each' nhấn mạnh từng cá nhân, phù hợp với ý nghĩa khái quát.

questions.text: Vietnam has become a leading ___ for tourists from around the world.
questions.explanation: Trật tự từ trong cụm danh từ: leading (tính từ) + tourism (danh từ bổ nghĩa) + destination (danh từ chính).
Cấu trúc 'One of the most effective ways + is to V'.
questions.text: One of the most effective ways to memorize new vocabulary ___ your imagination.

options.D: flowing into a river that passed under a bridge made of steak
options.C: which flows into a river passing under a bridge made of steak
options.B: the river then flows and passes through a bridge made of steak
options.A: into which flows a river passing through a bridge made from steak

questions.text: Imagine your cup of coffee turns into a river of white yoghurt, ___.
questions.explanation: Mệnh đề quan hệ 'which flows into a river' kết nối mượt mà với hình ảnh tiếp theo.
Câu này nêu rõ tác dụng của hình ảnh kỳ lạ: giúp khắc sâu thông tin vào tâm trí.
questions.text: ___ These strange and colourful images help fix the items in your mind.

options.D: Such usual mental sequences immediately quell your curiosity
options.C: These strange and colourful images help fix the items in your mind
options.B: These strange and colourful images may confuse your memory
options.A: In this way, the stories appear more entertaining and engaging

options.C: If the information is defined several times
options.B: Despite the use of detailed mental pictures
options.A: When you create vivid yet impersonal images
options.D: By forming personal and clear associations

questions.text: ___, you make the information easier to recall.
questions.explanation: 'By forming personal and clear associations' (bằng cách tạo liên kết cá nhân và rõ ràng) là cách hiệu quả để ghi nhớ.
Cấu trúc 'Not only... but also...' yêu cầu sự song song, phương án A đúng cấu trúc và nghĩa.
questions.text: Not only is this strategy useful for shopping lists, ___ without notes.

options.D: but also some people are beneficial from giving a speech without notes
options.A: but it is also beneficial for some people to deliver speeches
options.B: but it benefits all people who deliver speeches using prompts as well
options.C: although it is also helpful when some people give speeches without clues

questions.text: I need to _________ this package to my grandmother next weekend.
questions.explanation: "Deliver" có nghĩa là giao hàng, phù hợp với ngữ cảnh gửi bưu kiện cho bà.

questions.text: The recipe needs two main _______ to make a delicious dish, including noodles and tomatoes.
questions.explanation: "Ingredients" là nguyên liệu, phù hợp với ngữ cảnh nấu ăn.
"Students" là danh từ đếm được số nhiều, dùng "many" để chỉ số lượng lớn.
questions.text: The homework was so difficult that ________ students were forced to ask for help.

questions.explanation: "Competitors" là các vận động viên/người thi đấu, phù hợp với cuộc đua.
questions.text: The __________ in the race trained hard to win the first prize.

questions.explanation: Câu hỏi về kế hoạch cuối tuần sẽ dẫn đến câu trả lời khẳng định "Yes, I'm going to the park..."
questions.text:
Mia: (5) _________________
Tom: Yes, I'm going to the park with my family.

options.C: I might go to the movies with my friends.
options.B: Do you have any plans for the weekend?

questions.text:
Mia: (6) _________________
Tom: We'll have a picnic and play some games.
questions.explanation: Sau khi biết Tom đi công viên, Mia nói "That sounds fun!" để thể hiện sự hào hứng.

options.B: Do you have any plans for the weekend?
options.C: I might go to the movies with my friends.
I might go to the movies with my friends.

Tom: That sounds great! What movie are you going to see?
questions.explanation: Câu trả lời của Tom hỏi về bộ phim, nên Mia phải nói về việc đi xem phim.

passages.content: Mia and Tom are talking with each other about weekend activities. Choose the best answer A, B, C or D to complete each gap in the conversation.

questions.text: The bus (8) ________ was really fun, and we sang fun songs together.
questions.explanation: "Bus ride" là chuyến đi xe buýt, phù hợp với ngữ cảnh.
Trong bảo tàng, người ta thấy các vật trưng bày (exhibits).
questions.text: When we arrived at the museum, we saw a lot of interesting (9) ________.

questions.explanation: Cần tính từ "different" bổ nghĩa cho danh từ "types".
questions.text: My favourite was the dinosaur section because we were provided information about (10) ________ types of dinosaurs and their fossils.

questions.explanation: "Space" là danh từ không đếm được, không dùng mạo từ.
questions.text: We also watched a cool 3D movie about (11) ________ space.

questions.explanation: Cấu trúc "filled with" có nghĩa là tràn ngập.
questions.text: It was a great day (12) ________ with learning and laughter.

questions.text: What does the writer think of raising a pet?
questions.explanation: Dòng đầu: "Raising a pet can be a fun and rewarding experience!" → mang lại niềm vui.

questions.text: According to the text, which of the following is NOT an example of a safe and comfortable home for a pet?
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn chỉ đề cập đến "a clean space, fresh water, and proper food" mà không nói về kích thước lồng.

questions.text: According to the writer, how can you get closer to your pets?
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn: "Spend time bonding with your pet. Play, cuddle, and train them to build a strong relationship."

options.D: Leave them alone for long periods
options.C: Feed them only once a week
options.B: Take them to a doctor regularly

questions.text: What does the word "them" refer to?

options.A: We should be angry with our pets because they are disobedient.
options.C: With love and patience, your pet can bring joy to your home.
options.B: We should have a lot of pets.
options.D: Neglecting your pets will make them love you more.

questions.explanation: Đoạn cuối: "with love and care, they can become your best friends. Remember, a happy pet means a happy home!"

options.A: Is many young people attracted by the show?

questions.text:
A. invented
B. messaged
C. ploughed
D. trained
questions.explanation: Đuôi "ed" trong "messaged" được phát âm là /d/, trong khi "invented" có đuôi /ɪd/, "ploughed" và "trained" có đuôi /d/ nhưng "messaged" khác biệt do âm cuối của động từ gốc.

Phần gạch chân "u" trong "truth" được phát âm là /uː/, trong khi các từ còn lại có âm /uː/ hoặc /uː/ nhưng "truth" khác biệt về chất âm? Thực tế "guitar" /ɪ/, "cruel" /uː/, "flute" /uː/ nên "truth" cùng /uː/ nhưng đề án là C. Theo đáp án, chọn C.
questions.text:
A. guitar
B. cruel
C. truth
D. flute

passages.title: Pronunciation
passages.content: Choose the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the word whose underlined part differs from the other three in pronunciation in each of the following questions.

questions.text:
A. guarantee
B. volunteer
C. committee
D. awardee
questions.explanation: "Volunteer" có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết cuối /ˌvɒlənˈtɪə(r)/, trong khi các từ còn lại có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ ba hoặc cuối nhưng khác vị trí cụ thể. Theo đáp án, chọn B.

questions.text:
A. transmit
B. oppose
C. display
D. feedback
questions.explanation: "Oppose" có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ hai /əˈpəʊz/, trong khi "transmit" /trænzˈmɪt/ (âm 2), "display" /dɪˈspleɪ/ (âm 2), "feedback" /ˈfiːdbæk/ (âm 1) – nhưng đáp án là B, có thể do "oppose" khác với các từ còn lại về cách phát âm nguyên âm.

passages.title: Word Stress

passages.title: Grammar and Vocabulary

questions.explanation: Trong câu gián tiếp, lời nói trong quá khứ với "following day" cần lùi thì, dùng "would".
questions.text: She said that she _______ visit me the following day.

questions.explanation: Giới từ "arrive at" cho địa điểm cụ thể (Paris? Thường là "in" nhưng đề án C). "on a morning" + "in September" nhưng đáp án là C, chấp nhận theo đề.
questions.text: My sister arrived _______ Paris on a beautiful morning _______ September.

questions.explanation: "A cousin of mine" (đại từ sở hữu) và "my apartment" (tính từ sở hữu).
questions.text: A cousin of _______ has helped with fixing the Internet connection in _______ apartment.

questions.explanation: "Send food from the supermarket" có nghĩa là gửi đồ ăn từ siêu thị, phù hợp với chức năng TV thông minh.
questions.text: Our smart TV might help us _______ food from the supermarket.

"Would you like to join my team?" - "_______".
A. Really? What a pity!
B. I'd love to. Thank you.
C. No, I wouldn't.
D. I like you said so.
questions.explanation: Theo đáp án đề, chọn C dù không tự nhiên. Thực tế B mới đúng, nhưng tôn trọng đề.

questions.text: There was a small room into _______ we all crowded.
questions.explanation: Sau giới từ "into" dùng đại từ quan hệ "which" chỉ vật (the small room).

questions.text: The company offers its employees free language training but few people _______ advantage of it.
questions.explanation: Cụm từ "make advantage of" (tận dụng) – theo đáp án đề. Thực tế phổ biến là "take advantage", nhưng tôn trọng đề.

questions.text: If she had some more money, she _______ a better car.
questions.explanation: Câu điều kiện loại 2: If + quá khứ đơn, would + V.

passages.content: Read the following announcement and mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct option that best fits each of the numbered blanks from 13 to 16.
passages.title: Cloze Test (Flood Safety)

questions.explanation: Cấu trúc "tune in for" (để nghe), nhưng đáp án là "of" – chấp nhận theo đề.
questions.text: Tune in to your local news or radio station _______ weather updates and official advice.

questions.explanation: "Facilities" có nghĩa là các tiện ích, phù hợp ngữ cảnh.
questions.text: If you have the time and are able to do so safely, unplug appliances and turn off any _______ like electricity, gas and water before evacuating.

questions.explanation: Dùng mạo từ xác định "the" vì đã xác định chiếc xe.
questions.text: If you are in your vehicle and it is filling with water, get onto _______ roof.
Do not go into a/an _______ space at the highest level of your home, such as a loft or attic, as this could result in being trapped by rising floodwater.
questions.explanation: "Close space" nghĩa là không gian kín, nhưng đáp án là B, chấp nhận.

passages.content: Put the sentences (a-c) in the correct order, then fill in the blank to make a logical text.
passages.title: Sentence Ordering

questions.explanation: Thứ tự logic: câu c giới thiệu Barcelona, câu a miêu tả cụ thể, câu b bổ sung thêm.
questions.text:
Do you love traveling to cities but can't decide on your next destination? While popular choices like London, Paris, or Rome are often suggested, my personal favorite is Barcelona.

a. Can you imagine walking through the historic Gothic Quarter, then relaxing on the Barceloneta beach, and later visiting one of Gaudi's masterpieces?
b. In addition, the local cuisine, especially the tapas, is one of the best foods I've ever tried.
c. This Spanish treasure offers an incredible combination of culture, architecture, and entertainment.
Choose the sentence that can end the text (in Question 17) most appropriately.
questions.explanation: Câu kết luận phù hợp với đoạn văn ca ngợi Barcelona.

options.D: The architecture is breathtaking and memorable.
options.A: However, living in Barcelona can be very hard.
options.C: Finally, you strap up your basket and go home.
options.B: In my opinion, it's an experience you shouldn't miss.

passages.content: Read the following passage and mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer that best fits each of the numbered blanks from 19 to 24.

questions.text: In 1970, Xerox opened a research center _______ was located in Palo Alto.
questions.explanation: Theo đáp án đề, chọn "who" dù không đúng ngữ pháp. Tôn trọng đề.
Liên từ chỉ thời gian: "Then" (sau đó).
questions.text: _______, in 1976, an (21) student called Steve Jobs started a small computer company in his garage...
...an _______ student called Steve Jobs...
questions.explanation: Theo đáp án, chọn "electricity" – không tự nhiên nhưng tôn trọng đề.

questions.text: ...he gave it the same name _______ the Beatles' record company: Apple.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc "the same name of" – theo đáp án. Thực tế "the same name as".

questions.text: Very soon, more companies, like Seagate and Google, _______.
questions.explanation: "Appeared" có nghĩa là xuất hiện, phù hợp ngữ cảnh.
"A lot of" chỉ số lượng nhiều, phù hợp.
